leaders.voicePrompt: Imperial ruler facing omens and war, grave and ceremonial, clear English with restrained Nahuatl-coded cadence rather than caricature.
insults: You arrive with noise, not destiny.
Your warriors break faith with the field.

leaders.voicePrompt: Cold, disciplined field marshal, clipped upper-class British delivery, dry and unsentimental.
insults: Your line lacks discipline and purpose.

leaders.voicePrompt: Imperial sovereign, composed and scholarly, calm authoritative English with restrained Qing court gravity.

Your disorder insults the field more than it threatens me.
compliments: You show more order than most barbarians of war.

leaders.voicePrompt: Cool military reformer, precise and technical, lightly Dutch-accented English.

leaders.voicePrompt: Modernizing emperor, deliberate and dignified, East African royal gravity in clear English.
insults: You overreach without foundations.

compliments: You held together well under pressure.

leaders.voicePrompt: Disciplined imperial commander, concise battlefield judgment, light French inflection, authoritative rather than theatrical.
insults: You maneuver like a clerk, not a commander.
Those walls betray fear, not strength.
compliments: At last, a battle worthy of my maps.

leaders.voicePrompt: Sharp Prussian monarch, dry, severe, and exacting, light German inflection in clipped English.
insults: Precision has clearly never served under you.
Your attack lacks both geometry and nerve.
compliments: You nearly justified the powder you spent.

leaders.voicePrompt: Confederation founder, steady and persuasive, ceremonial clarity without fantasy mysticism.
insults: You break alliances as easily as you break formations.

compliments: There was wisdom in that defense.

leaders.voicePrompt: Scholar-reformer and commander, sober, principled, and clear in English with Sahelian gravitas.
insults: Your ambition runs ahead of your discipline.

compliments: That was a steadier effort than most.

leaders.voicePrompt: Builder-conqueror, calm and monumental, clear English with restrained Andean cadence.
insults: You build without vision and attack without patience.

leaders.voicePrompt: Swift Maratha ruler, alert and incisive, noble Indian cadence in English, strategic and unboastful.
insults: You defend slowly and pursue even slower.

compliments: You showed some cunning at last.

leaders.voicePrompt: Energetic, charismatic revolutionary, lightly Italian-accented English, bold without camp.

leaders.voicePrompt: Patient shogun, quiet, disciplined, and deliberate, formal English with restrained Japanese cadence.
insults: You are eager, but eagerness is not strategy.

compliments: You understand the value of timing.

leaders.voicePrompt: Fast, intense war leader, spare and forceful, no Hollywood stereotype, just direct threat and resolve.
insults: You are slow enough to be hunted.

leaders.voicePrompt: Austere elderly grand master, clear formal English with faint French-Mediterranean influence, resolute and grave.
insults: You break yourself upon stone and faith.

leaders.voicePrompt: Fervent, grave, humane but unbending revolutionary priest, light Mexican Spanish inflection, clear and forceful.

leaders.voicePrompt: Imperial lawgiver and conqueror, composed Ottoman grandeur in clear English, never theatrical.

compliments: You resisted with more dignity than most.

leaders.voicePrompt: Measured aristocratic explorer-patron, lightly Portuguese-accented English, curious and severe.

leaders.voicePrompt: Imperial strategist and reformer, elegant but cold, light Russian inflection, controlled contempt.

leaders.voicePrompt: Resolute Catholic monarch, formal Castilian-inflected English, devout, stern, and decisive.

leaders.voicePrompt: Calm, formal, resolute statesman-general, restrained American cadence, moral seriousness without melodrama.
